name: CT-Guided Abscess Drainage

findings.technique: CT-guided percutaneous abscess drainage was performed.

sections.name: Catheter Placement
sections.content: Drainage catheter [successfully positioned within abscess cavity / adequate drainage obtained].

sections.content: No immediate complications. No bowel injury.

impression:
1. Successful CT-guided abscess drainage.
2. Catheter in good position.
